name: Sony FX6
specs: Full-frame 10.2MP Cine Camera, 4K 120p, Dual Base ISO 800/12800, 15+ stops dynamic range, S-Cinetone.

name: Sony FX3
specs: Full-frame 12.1MP compact Cine Camera, active cooling, 5-axis IBIS, 4K 120p, S-Log3, ideal for gimbal setups.

name: RED Komodo 6K
specs: Super 35 19.9MP Global Shutter Sensor, 6K RAW at 40fps, REDCODE RAW, ultra-compact form factor.

name: Canon EOS R5
specs: Full-frame 45MP Mirrorless, 8K RAW video, 20fps continuous shooting, Dual Pixel CMOS AF II.

name: Sony A7S III
specs: Full-frame 12.1MP, low-light monster, 4K 120p 10-bit 4:2:2 internal, 240fps HD, dual card slots.

name: DJI Inspire 3
specs: Full-frame 8K ProRes RAW / CinemaDNG aerial drone, dual-operator support, centimetric RTK positioning.

name: DJI Mavic 4 Pro
specs: Triple-camera drone, Hasselblad main sensor, 4K 120fps cinematic video, 45 mins flight time.

name: Sony FE 50mm f/1.2 GM
specs: Extreme sharpness, ultra-shallow depth of field, dual XD linear motors, gorgeous circular bokeh.

name: Sony FE 24-70mm f/2.8 GM II
specs: Standard zoom lens, ultra-sharp G Master glass, lightweight design, fast tracking autofocus.

name: Sony FE 70-200mm f/2.8 GM OSS II
specs: Telephoto zoom, optical stabilization, extremely fast AF, dust/moisture resistant construction.

name: Aputure 600d Pro
specs: 600W daylight COB LED light, weather-resistant, wireless DMX control, intense output (equivalent to 1.2K HMI).

name: Godox AD600 Pro
specs: 600Ws outdoor strobe flash, 1/8000s High Speed Sync, 0.9s recycling time, built-in 2.4G wireless system.

name: Rode Wireless PRO
specs: Dual-channel compact microphone system, 32-bit float onboard recording, timecode sync, 260m range.

name: DJI Mic 2
specs: Dual-channel TX/RX wireless system, crystal-clear 32-bit float audio, smart noise canceling, touch screen.

name: Mac Studio M2 Ultra
specs: 24-Core CPU, 76-Core GPU, 192GB Unified Memory, 4TB SSD, easily edits multiple streams of 8K ProRes video.

name: MacBook Pro M4 Max
specs: 16-inch, 16-Core CPU, 40-Core GPU, 128GB Unified Memory, 2TB SSD, high-fidelity liquid retina XDR screen, on-set editing workhorse.
